inputs.label: Heartbeats Counted
inputs.businessContext: Number of pulse beats counted over the measurement period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of pulse beats counted over the measurement period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm süresi boyunca sayılan nabız atım sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Pulsschläge, die über den Messzeitraum gezählt wurden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de pulsations comptées sur la période de mesure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de pulsaciones cardíacas contadas durante el período de medición.

inputs.label: Measurement Duration
inputs.businessContext: Time in seconds over which the beats were counted.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time in seconds over which the beats were counted.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit in Sekunden, über die die Schläge gezählt wurden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps en secondes pendant lequel les battements ont été comptés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo en segundos durante el cual se contaron los latidos.

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the person for reference comparison.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the person for reference comparison.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge de la personne pour référence comparative.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad de la persona para comparación de referencia.

inputs.label: Fitness Level
inputs.businessContext: Self-assessed fitness level from 1 (sedentary) to 10 (elite athlete). Used for interpretation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Self-assessed fitness level from 1 (sedentary) to 10 (elite athlete). Used for interpretation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 (hareketsiz) ile 10 (elit atlet) arasında kendini değerlendirilen fitness seviyesi. Yorumlama için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Selbst eingeschätztes Fitnessniveau von 1 (sesshaft) bis 10 (Spitzensportler). Wird zur Interpretation verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau de forme physique auto-évalué de 1 (sédentaire) à 10 (athlète d'élite). Utilisé pour l'interprétation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de condición física autoevaluado de 1 (sedentario) a 10 (atleta de élite). Se utiliza para interpretación.

formulas.breakdown2Text: 'Normal resting heart rate ranges from 60 to 100 bpm for adults. Athletes may have 40-60 bpm.'

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
